name: Nutty Coconut Bread (Machine) - Large Loaf
recipeIngredient: 2 tsp Yeast, fast rise or machine
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the water, yeast (either fast rise/machine or active dry), and salt.
2. Stir until the yeast is dissolved.
3. Add the flour and mix until just combined.
4. Mix in the butter, cream of coconut, shredded coconut, pecans, and walnuts.
5. Grease a 9x5 inch loaf pan with cooking spray or brush with melted butter.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and smooth the top.
7. Cover the pan with plastic wrap and let it rise in a warm place for about 1 hour, or until doubled in size.
8. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
9. Bake the bread for 30-35 minutes, or until golden brown and sounds hollow when tapped on the bottom.
10. Remove from the oven and let cool in the pan for 5 minutes before turning it out onto a wire rack to cool completely.
11. Serve warm or at room temperature with your favorite toppings, such as jam or honey. Store any leftovers in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 3 days.
